purpose: User-invocable router skill for project setup, discovery, auditing, and analysis commands. Maps 22 project commands across 5 categories: Setup (!project, !initialize, !onboard, !scaffold, !create_claude), Analysis & Auditing (!context, !review, !health, !scope, !trace, !contracts, !env_check, !plan, !prompt_audit), PKI & Instrumentation (!learn, !learn_update, !instrument), TOC Management (!toc, !toc_generate, !toc_update), Discovery (!commands, !profiles, !help). Each routes to a _commands/{Synapse|project}/*.md spec file. Includes shell preprocessing to inject PROJECT_ROOT into the prompt at load time.
gotchas: Dispatcher only — does NOT contain command logic; routes to _commands/{Synapse,project}/*.md
argument-hint is `<command> [args]` — user types the command name as argument
patterns: Router skill pattern: routing tables grouped by category + 'read the spec file' instruction
conventions: Category grouping: Setup / Analysis / PKI / TOC / Discovery
